workflows.name: Write Path
workflows.summary: The process of persisting a user write through the WAL and MemTable, including the eventual flush to an SSTable.

workflows.name: Read Path
workflows.summary: The process of retrieving a value by searching through the MemTable, Immutable MemTables, and SSTables across levels.

workflows.name: Compaction Cycle
workflows.summary: The background process of merging SSTables from higher levels to lower levels to reclaim space and optimize reads.

workflows.name: Crash Recovery
workflows.summary: The process of reconstructing the database state from the Manifest and replaying the WAL after an unclean shutdown.

workflows.name: Range Scan
workflows.summary: The process of iterating over a sorted range of keys across multiple memory and disk components.
